arts.ttl: PSG see opening goal against Man City ruled out after Nuno Mendes' KNEE is offside in Champions League clash
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain were disappointed just before half-time after their would-be opening goal was ruled out for offside in their Champions League clash with Manchester City on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: Manchester City accused of encouraging Bah to break Valladolid contract
arts.sum: Spanish club threaten legal action over defender Sierra Leonean missed training on Tuesday Real Valladolid have accused Manchester City of advising their defender Juma Bah to break his contract and not train on Tuesday to force a cheaper move to the Premier League champions, with the Spanish club threatening legal action. Bah, an 18-year-old centre-back, joined Valladolid in August and became the first Sierra Leonean to play in La Liga. The club say Bah has bought out his youth contract after refusing to sign a senior deal that would have made him more expensive. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Romano CONFIRMS Chelsea approach for top Man City target
arts.sum: Chelsea have approached Juventus over a loan for Douglas Luiz, according to Fabrizio Romano. So far, Juventus have only received loan approaches from Luiz's suitors, which have chiefly included Man City .

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: PSG-Man City, Madrid-Salzburg
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Paris Saint-Germain host Manchester City, Real Madrid take on RB Salzburg and Arsenal face Dinamo Zagreb.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Bid for Ndour Could Unlock Skriniar’s Move to Fenerbahce
arts.sum: Fiorentina have emerged as a key player in a complex transfer scenario involving Paris Saint-Germain (PSG), Juventus, and Fenerbahce. Calciomercato report that the Viola have submitted a formal offer to PSG for the permanent transfer of Cher Ndour, a move that could have far-reaching implications for several high-profile transfers. The post Fiorentina’s Bid for Ndour Could Unlock Skriniar’s Move to Fenerbahce appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa Identify €60M-Rated Liverpool, PSG Target as Diego Carlos Replacement
arts.sum: Sevilla’s Loïc Badé has been turning heads with his performances, especially after shining for France at the Summer Olympics. With Milan Skriniar now at Fenerbahçe SK, Paris Saint-Germain might be on the lookout for a center-back. Badé’s rise hasn’t gone unnoticed. arts.ttl: Pressure on for Man City & PSG - could Champions League exit happen?
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Paris St-Germain on Wednesday with both sides battling to stay in the new-look Champions League - BBC Sport looks at what both teams need and what an early exit could mean.

arts.ttl: Man City accused of encouraging player to break contract
arts.sum: Real Valladolid accuse Manchester City of encouraging one of their players to break his contract to force through a move to the Premier League club.

arts.ttl: When is the UEFA Champions League knockout playoff draw? Man City date, time and rules
arts.sum: Liverpool have already secured a place in the knockout stages of the Champions League while Man City must win both of their last two games in the competition
